description:
Free desktop organizer that groups your desktop icons into smart fences.

DeskTuna is a free, ad-free desktop organizer for Windows 10 and 11. It lets you group
your desktop icons into named, colored, resizable fences with drag-and-drop.
Fences stay in place — immune to "Show Desktop" (Win+D), minimize gestures and restarts.
Includes folder portals (live folder contents as a fence), roll-up, layout snapshots
with one-click restore, full multi-monitor support, themes and automatic delta updates.
Installs per-user without administrator rights. Privacy-friendly: no personal data is
collected (anonymous usage counters only, opt-out available in Settings).
